title: Tasty
description: CSS-in-JS styling engine for React with a declarative, state-aware DSL, design token integration, and SSR support.

title: Glaze
description: Predictable OKHST color theme generator with WCAG contrast solving. Zero dependencies. Generates light, dark, and high-contrast schemes.

title: OKHST
description: An OKHSL-derived tone space for stable perceptual lightness and contrast-oriented color ramps.

title: @tenphi/eslint-plugin-tasty
description: ESLint plugin for validating tasty() and tastyStatic() style objects — tokens, states, presets, and property names.

title: Tasty VS Code Extension
description: VS Code syntax highlighting for Tasty DSL inside style objects.

title: tasty.style
description: Source code for Tasty’s official website, documentation, live playground, and interactive showcase.

title: Cube Cloud
description: Deploy, optimize and scale Cube.js applications. UI, UX, and frontend development.

title: Cube Cloud UIKit
description: UIKit for Cube Cloud. Built with React, React Aria, and Tasty CSS generator.

title: Subtly.Media
description: Smart subtitles for Netflix. Idea, UI, UX, and full-stack development.

title: Sellerscale
description: Smarter financial management for Amazon sellers. UI, UX, and frontend.

title: Numl.Design Website
description: Landing, Storybook, Handbook, Documentation, and REPL for the Numl.Design project.

title: Numl Theme Generator
description: Visual CSS color theme generator by Numl.Design.

title: tenphi.me
description: Source code for this personal website and blog, built with Astro, React, Tasty, and Glaze.
